title: The Man & The Snake
content:
In pity he brought the poor Snake
    To be warmed at his fire. A mistake!
    For the ungrateful thing
    Wife & children would sting.
    I have known some as bad as the Snake.

    Beware How You Entertain Traitors
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walter Crane delivers a powerful performance in "The Man & The Snake"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
